name: City Simulator
description: City Simulator is a browser-based simulation game that requires no downloads to play. Drawing inspiration from classic urban adventure games, players are assigned various tasks within the City Simulator environment. By completing these tasks, players are rewarded with prizes and diamonds. Your mission is to confront and overcome the citys criminals to safeguard the metropolis! Website Developer <a href='https://www.onlinegames.io/'>https://www.onlinegames.io/</a>
